parameters.text:
=Here are your instructions:

[BEGIN SYSTEM PERSONA]

{{ $('Get System Persona').last().json.content }}

[END SYSTEM PERSONA]

Here is the information for the story:

[BEGIN STORY INFORMATION]

{{ $('Get Character & Story Dossier').last().json.content }}

[END STORY INFORMATION]

Read the following Manuscript Overhaul Plan for this novel:

[BEGIN MANUAL OVERHAUL PLAN]

{{ $('Manuscript Overhaul Plan').last().json.text }}

[END MANUAL OVERHAUL PLAN]

Here is the most recently revised chapters in this novel:

[BEGIN CURRENT MANUSCRIPT]
{{ $('Format MOP Context').last().json.recentChaptersText }}
[END CURRENT MANUSCRIPT]


Now, based on this Manual Overhaul Plan, produce a detailed Editing Plan for the current chapter so that it incorporates the suggestions of the Overhaul Plan. It's okay if you don't need to do much editing. Just be specific on anything that needs addressing. Don't deviate from the plot or add any unnecessary extra information.

[BEGIN CURRENT CHAPTER]

{{ $json.content }}

[END CURRENT CHAPTER]

=[BEGIN SYSTEM PERSONA]

{{ $('Get System Persona').last().json.content }}

[END SYSTEM PERSONA]

[BEGIN STORY INFORMATION]

{{ $('Get Character & Story Dossier').last().json.content }}

[END STORY INFORMATION]

[BEGIN WRITING STYLE GUIDELINES]

{{ $('Get Writing Style Guide').last().json.content }}

[END WRITING STYLE GUIDELINES]

Here is the revised manuscript so far:

[BEGIN CURRENT MANUSCRIPT]
{{ $('Format MOP Context').last().json.recentChaptersText }}
[END CURRENT MANUSCRIPT]

Here are the details for the current chapter:

[BEGIN CHAPTER EDITING PLAN]

{{ $('Chapter MOP Plan').item.json.text }}

[END CHAPTER EDITING PLAN]

[BEGIN CHAPTER DRAFT]

{{ $('Get Chapter File').item.json.content }}

[END CHAPTER DRAFT]

Revise the current chapter according to the Plan. Only change what is needed to suit the plan. Do not add items not mentioned in the chapter. Keep all prose the same except where opportunities have been identified to edit or expand. Maintain the same tone and style per the Writing Style Guidelines. Use only nonstandard dialogue tags and avoid cliche endings.

Target Word Count: 2,000-2,500 words.

Please start your chapter with the tag [BEGIN CHAPTER X] and end with [END CHAPTER X]. Use this exact configuration and numbering that matches the appropriate current chapter number. Never address me, just provide the content as requested.

parameters.subject: Your Book is Done
parameters.message:
Hey gorgeous,

Your MOP Manuscript is done. Go check it out.
